name: Prospect — Mature events program
description: For companies running webinars and repurposing content. Angle: you've solved production — let's talk pipeline attribution, CRM depth, and scale.

fields.label: Industry
fields.placeholder: e.g. SaaS, Healthcare, Public sector, Financial services…

fields.label: Their main use case
fields.placeholder: e.g. product showcase, pipeline generation, customer education, thought leadership
fields.hint: Combined with industry to personalise examples and copy throughout the page.

fields.label: Their current platform (optional)
fields.hint: If filled, referenced naturally in the hero.

fields.label: Their CRM (optional)
fields.hint: Used in the attribution section if filled.

fields.label: Your observation (optional)
fields.placeholder: I can see from your job postings that you're building out a demand gen function — suggests you're trying to scale events beyond a few people…
fields.hint: 1–2 sentences showing you've done your homework. Leave blank and it won't appear.

fields.label: Their challenge 1
fields.default: Hard to attribute revenue to specific events or sessions
fields.placeholder: e.g. No way to prove events ROI to the CFO

fields.label: Their challenge 2 (optional)
fields.placeholder: e.g. Production overhead limits how many events they can run

fields.label: Booking link (optional)
fields.hint: Replaces the email CTA with a direct booking link.
